submitting.$description: Whether a submit request is in flight

errorMessage.$description: Most recent error message from the server

oauthProvider.$description: Which OAuth provider is being used

visual.$description: Submit button shows spinner, inputs disabled

content.$description: Same card but submit button shows spinner animation and all inputs are disabled

visual.$description: Card shakes, error message appears below password field
Error message: 'Too many attempts. Try again in {retryAfterSeconds}s.' Submit button disabled with countdown.
Real-time field validation — password strength indicator, email format check. Per-field error messages appear below invalid fields.
Spinner on submit, all fields disabled
Shake + field-level errors. email: 'Already registered', password: 'Must be 8+ characters'
Waiting for user to click email link
Green checkmark replaces resend button, 'Email sent!' confirmation text
Red error text: 'Failed to resend. Try again.'
Full-page loading state with provider logo and 'Redirecting to {provider}...' text. Spinner animation.
Terminal state — app redirects to main content
